name: io.github.atomno-mcp/mcp-pharma
description: Russian drug reference — check ГРЛС registration status, get a drug card (forms, holder, ATC), look up ЖНВЛП inclusion and the state price cap, check Roszdravnadzor recalls, and link the official instruction. Reference data, not medical advice.

environmentVariables.name: MCP_PHARMA_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key (Pro tier) for ГРЛС/ЖНВЛП registration, price-cap, recall and instruction lookups.
